title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXIII. Literal
content:
1, 2, 3, 4, 5!
        I caught a hare alive;
            6, 7, 8, 9, 10!
        I let her go again.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. XXXIII. Literal"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
